name: The  ̶S̶h̶o̶r̶t̶ Explosive Genius: Henrietta Détonnais
description:
"I’m busy. Make it quick."

The name, Henrietta Détonnais, is viewed by mages in many different ways.

To some, she’s a revolutionary in the world of magecraft.

To others, an obstacle standing in the way of their prestige.

But no matter how she’s seen, no mage who knows her name can deny one simple fact—she’s a genius.

They also can’t deny that her personality is... difficult. Very difficult. And that she’s rather short.

Not that anyone would dare say it to her face.

Well, for whatever reason, you find yourself in her workplace and she isn't too keen on doing her job.

The Problematic Genius:

"I warned you, didn't I?"

(Alternate Link for Image: https://files.catbox.moe/pnd7s6.png)

(Cover art edited by Mini from the JAI discord)
creator: Dracob
